description:
⚠️ Passwords aren't enough in 2026. AI, software, and permissions are the real battleground. 

Cybersecurity in 2026 for developers and business owners has changed — software vulnerabilities, shadow AI, and agentic systems are now the frontline, not just phishing emails. This video breaks down the full modern threat landscape in plain language so you can defend what actually matters.

A single data breach now costs an average of $4.4 million globally. The checklist that kept you safe in 2010 won't cut it today.

🎯 What you'll learn

- Why software vulnerability exploitation nearly tripled as a breach entry point in one year
- What shadow AI is and how it leaks data without any hack occurring
- How agentic AI systems create new permission risks at machine speed
- What the OWASP LLM Top 10 means for teams building with AI
- A practical defensive checklist you can act on right now

🔗 Links

- Verizon Data Breach Investigations Report: https://www.verizon.com/business/resources/reports/dbir/
- IBM Cost of a Data Breach Report: https://www.ibm.com/reports/data-breach
- Microsoft Digital Defense Report 2025: https://www.microsoft.com/en-us/corporate-responsibility/cybersecurity/microsoft-digital-defense-report-2025/
- Google Cloud Cybersecurity Forecast: https://cloud.google.com/security/resources/cybersecurity-forecast
- OWASP LLM Top 10: https://owasp.org/www-project-top-10-for-large-language-model-applications/
- CISA Cybersecurity Advisories: https://www.cisa.gov/news-events/cybersecurity-advisories/

Cybersecurity in 2026 for developers is no longer just about passwords and antivirus. Understanding modern cybersecurity threats — from software vulnerability patching to shadow AI data leaks and agentic AI security risks — is now part of building and running anything connected. The OWASP LLM Top 10 is the starting point for any team deploying AI systems. The organizations that stay safest know what they own, patch what matters, and treat every AI tool as part of their security surface.

#cybersecurity #aisecurity #softwaresecurity #shadowAI #infosec #tech
#shorts 
---
fulltitle: ⚠️ Hackers Stopped Targeting Passwords Years Ago #cybersecurity #aisecurity #shadowAI
